cells.rationale: The cross-cutting shell refactor must preserve a subtle human-versus-Frames retention invariant across many coupled runtime and test surfaces.
This is a substantial but explicitly specified multi-file extraction spanning readiness composition, deterministic presentation, CLI registration, and Frames integration.
The bounded presentation rewrite has clear acceptance but requires careful projection, total ordering, malformed-data handling, and interaction removal.
Two substantial viewer refactors must coordinate deterministic serializers while preserving control, subscription, sidecar, and Frames behavior.
The two-file tmux topology change is small, reversible, explicitly shaped, and covered by deterministic exact-argv tests.
Audience-specific documentation and prompt guidance require wording judgment and careful distinction between human viewers and machine control surfaces.
